proven.claim: Proven: "--provider" is documented in help (line 552) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 552
; Proven: "--provider" is documented in help (line 552) and consumed by
; getFlag(args, "--provider") in runAnalyze, which then calls createProvider(providerName).
(declare-const provider_documented Int)
(declare-const provider_consumed Int)
(assert (= provider_documented 1))
; getFlag(args, "--provider") in runAnalyze → createProvider() call gated on it
(assert (= provider_consumed 1))
(assert (not (= provider_documented provider_consumed)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --provider is documented and consumed
